events.title: Meta’s new ‘AI Mode’ on Facebook pulls from public info across its platforms
events.summary: Meta announced Monday that it's rolling out a wave of new AI features on Facebook, the latest sign of the company's effort to catch up in the AI race and keep users more engaged on the platform.
